en_us.addon.changedextras.cone_kat.descr: A life form made to feed humans and end world hunger, Originates from Resurgenced, known as a Goopie or Foodie in there
ability.changedextras.claws.name: Claws
item.changedextras.artist_brush.tooltip: Right-click to edit texture path, hex tint, and UV offsets.
screen.changedextras.artist_brush.previe: Drag the UV box inside the texture preview
Shift + left-click a player or Changed entity with the brush to target it
message.changedextras.artist_brush.selec: Artist Brush target set to yourself
message.changedextras.artist_brush.brows: File browser unavailable here. Paste a PNG path into Texture Path.
message.changedextras.transfur_overlay.1: "Argh- What- whats happening?" you say, as the substance slowly covers your body.
message.changedextras.transfur_overlay.2: You've managed to get infected, great.
message.changedextras.transfur_overlay.3: Your vision slowly blurs, your skin burning with the infection.
message.changedextras.transfur_overlay.4: You prefer this instead of dying?
message.changedextras.transfur_overlay.5: Your body rejects it for a moment, then gives up all at once.
message.changedextras.transfur_overlay.6: The pain crawls through your nerves; no one is coming to save you.
message.changedextras.transfur_overlay.7: So this is how it ends, not with death, but with something worse wearing your shape.
message.changedextras.death_overlay.huma: You finally rest, at peace at last.
Through out heaven and earth, you aren't the honored one.
You slowly close your eyes, following the light...
Your breathing stops, and the silence takes the room.
No cursed comeback, no miracle, just the weight of the end.
For once, your body stops fighting what it was never going to survive.
message.changedextras.death_overlay.infe: You managed to find light in darkness.
The remaining consciousness you had is gone. Forever.
The goo slowly drips from you, "Am I dying?" your deteriorated brain says as you fade away.
The thing you became goes still, and whatever was left of you goes with it.
Even the latex lets go in the end, leaving nothing worth saving behind.
Somewhere under the rot, your last thought breaks apart before it can become words.
gamerule.changedextrasLatexEquipmentEnab: Whether Changed Extras latex creatures can spawn with random tools and armor.
gamerule.changedextrasLatexToolChance.de: The percent chance for Changed Extras latex creatures to spawn with a random tool.
gamerule.changedextrasLatexArmorChance.d: The percent chance for Changed Extras latex creatures to spawn with a random armor set.

message.changedextras.locked_syringe: The latex inside rejects you, it looks like it belongs to someone else
ability.changedextras.jackpot_aura.name: Jackpot
ability.changedextras.jackpot_aura.descr: Awakened Cursed Technique: Jackpot — infinite cursed energy flows through you.
